messages.content: Sorry, I don't understand what you are looking for here. Please provide more context or information so I can assist you better.
Beetle🪲

A beetle is an insect that belongs to the order Coleoptera. They have a characteristic hard outer shell called the elytra which protects their delicate wings when not in use. Beetles come in a variety of shapes, sizes, and colors and can be found in almost every type of habitat on earth. Some beetle species are pests that can cause damage to crops and property, while others are important decomposers that help break down organic matter and improve soil health.
this:🪲, not images.
now make that anim wider like every 10% and try to calculate moving and turning random directions of beetle if top of its emoji is head.

neagh. something wrong with calculations. when it reaches a turning point it should turn its head in that direction in exact right angle. not sure how can you imagine it but you still can calculate. also, set animation timer to 20 sec and alternate-reverse.
it looks a bit better, but need a stop frame to allow beetle to have time to turn its head in direction it's heading right now. try recalc with a stop frames for turning point.

no, wrong calc again. here's how it suppose to be rightfully looking: 1. beetle moves in some straight line to end turning angle rotation point. 2. beetle stops and start turning in place in the direction it should move next. 3. pretty much the same iteration again and again, with a random direction beetle goes.
it seems you cannot stop.
